title: File Upload Security Tester
description: Python tool testing file upload controls across 20+ bypass scenarios. Extension spoofing, null bytes, MIME confusion, path traversal, Unicode edge cases. 13/19 DVWA bypasses with verified RCE via webshell. WAF fingerprinting for Cloudflare, ModSecurity, AWS WAF. Multi-threaded via concurrent.futures — 5× faster than sequential.

title: Home SOC Lab
description: Production-grade dual-purpose lab for detection engineering and attack simulation. Wazuh v4.7.0 + Splunk Enterprise for live detection and log correlation. Docker-isolated attack targets: DVWA, OWASP Juice Shop, Metasploitable2. Startup time reduced from 30 min to under 2 min via automation scripts.

title: Bandook RAT C2 Analysis
description: Real-world PCAP analysis of Bandook RAT C2 communication. Identified dual-infrastructure C2: hardcoded primary IP 185.10.68.52 contacted 37 min before DNS resolution. Extracted full IOC set — base64-encoded custom TCP beaconing on port 6591. All TTPs mapped: T1071, T1571, T1573, T1568.
